home.title: Home
home.html:
Let’s Connect
Let’s Connect

ITS TIME TO

Drive in the future of urban mobility

Drive into the future of urban mobility with LetzRyd. Redefining city travel with seamless, smart, and efficient rides, we’re not just about getting you there – we’re about taking you forward.

Driving you forward, one ride at a time

With a fleet of over 1000 cars and more than 500,000 trips completed, we are redefining urban mobility in Hyderabad. Whether it's daily commutes or special journeys, we’re here to provide seamless, reliable, and safe rides. Your city, your comfort—experience the future of travel

1000+

500,000+

Trips

Fleet

1,400+

Drivers

Cities we’re driving In

LetzRyd is proud to be driving through the streets of Hyderabad, Bangalore and Mumbai bringing reliable and efficient urban mobility to the city.

But we’re not stopping there! With plans to expand, you’ll soon see us cruising in Delhi and Chennai and other new cities. Stay tuned as we continue to bring our seamless ride experience to more locations.

Your city could be next!

Our fleet of trusted brands

Our fleet features trusted favorites like the Hyundai Xcent, Citroen EC3, Maruti Suzuki WagonR, and Dzire, delivering the perfect blend of efficiency and comfort.

Steer your way to success!

Ready to shift gears and accelerate your career? Join the LetzRyd journey as a mobility entrepreneur! With our growing fleet and expanding market, you’ll be driving more than just cars—you’ll be driving your future. Start your engine and let’s ride towards success together!

Become Driver

Become our Driverpreneur

Empower urban mobility: invest in the future

Invest in the mobility revolution with LetzRyd! As our fleet grows and demand accelerates, you can drive profits while fueling the future of urban travel.

Get on board and watch your investment take off!

Become Investor

OUR MARQUEE INVESTORS

OUR FINANCIAL PARTNERS

Our journey is backed by the industry’s top financial partners, ensuring stability and trust at every step.

know-us.title: Know Us
know-us.html:
Let’s Connect
Let’s Connect

KNOW US

IT’S TIME TO

Discover LetzRyd and our mission to transform urban mobility with innovative, sustainable solutions. Learn how we’re shaping the future of city transportation for a smarter, greener tomorrow.

About us

LetzRyd provides vehicles and drivers to ride hailing service companies, as well as opportunities for vehicle ownership (including leasing) to drivers and their management companies. Through the vehicle and driver management platform, LetzRyd aims to improve driver incomes by increasing vehicle utilization rates.

drivers.title: Drivers
drivers.html:
Let’s Connect
Let’s Connect

BECOME A DRIVERPRENEUR

IT’S TIME TO

Build your own business, set your own hours, and drive toward success with the freedom and flexibility you deserve. Ready to start your journey?

Apply Now
FAQ

Join the elite circle of driver-partners!

As a LetzRyd Driverpreneur, you’re not just driving—you’re building a business on your terms. With unmatched support and opportunities designed to help you succeed, you'll unlock access to exclusive perks that elevate your journey. Ready to hit the road to success? LetzRyd is waiting for you!

Apply Now

Drive. Earn. Thrive!

As a LetzRyd driver-partner, you play a key role in shaping a sustainable future, all while enjoying the comfort of well-maintained vehicles.

Whenever you need us, we're just a call away to assist you.

24/7 Support

Weekly Payouts

Drive today, get paid every week. It's as simple.

Incentives

Earn more with attractive incentives drive & earn bigger!

Maintenance

Focus on Road. We maintain your vehicle for you.

Ease of Work

Enjoy the freedom to drive on your terms only with us.

Build Connections

Join a community of drivers, share tips, and grow together

Start your journey with zero investment, take the first step toward building a profitable future without financial barriers holding you back.

Unlock the opportunity to own your own vehicle and drive towards financial freedom. Possible only with LetzRyd!

Chance to own the vehicle.

Start with 0 Investment.

Other perks of joining us

Just three easy steps to join

Joining our team is simple! Follow a few easy steps and you'll be on your way to an exciting career with endless opportunities. No hassle, just a smooth path to success.

Apply at your nearest LetzRyd Onboarding centre.

APPLY

GET VERIFIED

BEGIN

Provide your KYC documents for a safe experience.

Start your journey with LetzRyd and start earning.

Apply Now

Your questions, answered

What are the Eligibility Criteria?

21+ Years of Age. You will need a Valid Drivers License, Aadhar & PAN Card, Local Address Proof to begin with registration.

Is there a deposit?

Yes, Our vehicles are accessible by payment of a nominal refundable deposit and a one time joining fee. The deposit varies depending on the type of the vehicle & city.

Should I have an existing account with Ride Hailing Apps?

No. We will onboard you on the apps without any charges.

When do I get paid?

Depending on the proposition payment are made on a weekly basis.

Are the vehicles insured?

Yes, All our vehicle are fully insured under comprehensive insurance policy.

Who maintains the vehicle?

LetzRyd maintains all its vehicles and the driver are expected to cooperate and attend scheduled services attend scheduled services, inspections as and when requested.

investors.title: Investors
investors.html:
Let’s Connect
Let’s Connect

invest in the future

IT’S TIME TO

It's time to invest in the future of urban mobility with LetzRyd. By joining us, you're not just embracing a smarter, more efficient way of transportation but also contributing to the future of sustainable travel. Drive the change with us and be part of the revolution in mobility solutions.

Apply Now
FAQ

Fuelling tomorrow's mobility, together

Become our investor and a key player in shaping the future of urban mobility. Together, we’ll fuel innovation, drive sustainable growth, and create smarter transportation solutions that transform the way cities move. Your investment today powers the progress of tomorrow.

Apply Now

Why LetzRyd?

Investing in LetzRyd means stepping into the future of urban mobility. With a growing fleet, strategic market expansion, and a focus on sustainable, efficient transportation.

Earn

Earn a solid 29%+ IRR with LetzRyd.

Your Asset

Kickstart your investment journey by starting with just 5 cars.

Steady Income

Our Investment Model ensures reliable earning and a steady income.

Diversified Investment

Diversify your portfolio by investing in the booming urban mobility.

Apply Now

Just 5 easy steps to join

DECIDE

SIGN

PAYMENT

EARN

Confirm the no. of vehicles.

TRACK

Execute E-Signature Agreement.

Make full payment to dealer.

Start earning monthly with us.

Track & monitor monthly cashflow.

Joining LetzRyd is simple! Just follow 5 easy steps to start your journey with us and become a part of the future of urban mobility.

Apply Now

Your Questions, Answered

What is LetzPartner programme?

The Partner program by LetzRyd is a vehicle lease alternate investment program. Under this, you the Partner buys and leases the vehicle to LetzRyd, for which you will receive a monthly assured lease rentals.

Who is eligible to participate in this programme?

Both individuals and corporates can participate in this. GST Registration is mandatory to participate (We can assist you in getting this)

What are the commercials?

The investment commitment is for a period of 4 years and the assured monthly Lease Rental depends on the vehicle and location.

Vehicle Level Concerns?

All repair and maintenance of the vehicle to be undertaken by LetzRyd and shall be responsible for any damage or on-road liability with regards to the car.

Vehicle Ownership Questions?

Partner has the flexibility of selling the vehicle at a pre-determined value to LetzRyd or retaining the vehicle. If a Partner chooses to opt out of the program before the end of tenor then it is subject to the terms of the lease agreement signed by both parties.

privacy-policy.html:
Let’s Connect

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: 05/02/2026

THIS DOCUMENT IS AN ELECTRONIC RECORD IN TERMS OF INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY ACT, 2000 AND RULES THERE UNDER AS APPLICABLE AND THE AMENDED PROVISIONS PERTAINING TO ELECTRONIC RECORDS IN VARIOUS STATUTES AS AMENDED BY THE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY ACT, 2000. THIS ELECTRONIC RECORD IS GENERATED BY A COMPUTER SYSTEM AND DOES NOT REQUIRE ANY PHYSICAL OR DIGITAL SIGNATURES.

THIS DOCUMENT IS PUBLISHED IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE PROVISIONS OF RULE 3 (1) OF THE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY (INTERMEDIARIES GUIDELINES) RULES, 2011 THAT REQUIRE PUBLISHING INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY (INTERMEDIARIES GUIDELINES) RULES, 2011 THAT REQUIRE PUBLISHING INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY (INTERMEDIARIES GUIDELINES) RULES, 2011 THAT REQUIRE PUBLISHING THE RULES AND REGULATIONS, TERMS OF SERVICES, PRIVACY POLICY AND USER AGREEMENT FOR ACCESS OR TERMS OF USAGE OF www. letzryd.com (HEREINAFTER REFERRED TO AS THE “SITE”).

YOUR USE OF THIS SITE OR YOUR PROVISION TO USE OF ANY PERSONAL INFORMATION CONSTITUTES YOUR AGREEMENT TO THESE TERMS AND ANY SUBSEQUENT CHANGES TO THESE TERMS; DO NOT USE THE SITE OR PROVIDE INFORMATION IF YOU DO NOT AGREE WITH ALL OF THE TERMS.

Privacy Notice

Though we make every eﬀort to preserve the user privacy, we may need to disclose personal information when required by law wherein we have a good-faith belief that such ac on is necessary to comply with an appropriate law enforcement investigation, current judicial proceeding, a court order or legal process served on our Site, or as required by law. We may also need to disclose the personal information to a third party for the purpose of delivery of the services to the users.

General Description

The Site may collect a user’s name, postal address, telephone number, mobile number, e-mail address, Permanent Account Number (PAN), Aadhaar card, and driving licence. The data collected by the Company will be retained for a reasonable period of me as may be required and as required under Applicable Law. (“Applicable Laws” means all applicable data protection and privacy laws, rules, and regulations in force in the relevant jurisdiction governing the Processing of Personal Data, including, where applicable, the Information Technology (Reasonable Security Practices and Procedures and Sensitive Personal Data or Information) Rules, 2011, and the Information Technology Act, 2000 along with rules, as may be amended from me to me). Besides the above, Members (being any registered users, drivers, customers or any persons accessing the Site) intending to create an account may be asked to submit personal information including driving license, proof of identity etc. Besides information pertaining to the Member’s credit card/debit card or bank account details. Explicit consent from users will be obtained before collecting any sensitive personal data or information from all pares, as required under Applicable Law. The Site may also be required to collect the PAN card details and any such detail which is relevant to carry out the transaction. This information is requested if the user is entering into a transaction and is further used to deliver the services as has been requested by the user. The data so collected from the user shall also be used to manage the Site, and detect any fraud or site abuses. Other personal information that we collect includes the following: Vehicle Use Data: Vehicles will contain hardware that gathers and transmits information about vehicle use. This is done as a security measure against accident or the and also to provide you with valuable services and information, such as other drivers’ data. Location Tracking: To prevent the , and to allow us to locate you in case of emergency, accident, lock-out, etc., we track the location of your vehicle. Your location information will be confined to Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited service, and we will never impermissibly make your location or movements public. The Company shares driver details, name, personal data, Aadhaar card details, PAN card details with third par es as necessary to deliver services and verify identity. All such sharing will be subject to contractual safeguards and conducted in accordance with Applicable Law. As part of our service, the location of your vehicle may be released to insurance companies, the police, or similar par es in the course of an investigation and/or accident claim, and to provide assistance in emergencies. Information regarding the location of each vehicle on Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited Ltd.’s site is also transmitted to Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited and can be tracked by your Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited-enabled smartphone. Driver and Vehicle Information: As a customer of Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited’s Site, you authorize us to access your driver’s record, vehicle history report from all applicable en es and authorities. This authorization continues for as long as you are a Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited customer. Moreover, you authorize all DMVs, RMVs, auto mechanics and all other en es and interested par es to release information to us regarding your driving record and vehicle history. You have the right to request that Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited discontinue use of your personal information. To withdraw your consent to our collection and processing of your information at any me, you may do so by closing your account.

Collection and Use of Non-Personal Information: We also collect non-personal information – data in a form that does not permit direct association with any specific individual, including IP addresses, usage details and identifying technologies. We may use, transfer, collect and disclose non-personal information for any purpose. If we do combine non-personal information with personal information, the combined information will be treated as personal information for as long as it remains combined. Aggregate Information: We may share non-personally identifiable information (such as referring/exit pages, anonymous usage data, and URLs, platform types, number of clicks, etc.) with interested third pares to help them understand the usage patterns for certain Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited services. Third-party ad servers or ad networks may serve advertisements on the Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited’s Site. These third-party ad servers or ad networks may automatically receive your IP address when they serve ads to your Internet browser. They may also use other technologies (such as cookies, JavaScript, or web beacons) to measure the eﬀectiveness of their advertisements and to personalize the adver sing content. We do not provide any personally identifiable information to these third-par es without your consent. However, please note that if an advertiser asks Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited to show an adver sement to a certain audience and you respond to that advertisement, the advertiser or ad-server may conclude that you fit the description of the audience they are trying to reach. The Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited Privacy Policy does not apply to, and we cannot control the ac vi es of, third-party advertisers.

Normal Browsing

As with many websites, we collect certain information. When you browse, read, or download information from the Site, data is collected by the Site, including but not limited to your IP address, URL request, browser type, and date and me of your request. We collect the IP addresses of visitors, me of access, browser type, and web pages visited. We do not collect any other information without your knowledge and permission.

Information You Provide

Information You Provide The Site requests personally identifiable information when you seek a query from the Contact Us Tab on the Site and is subject to the Terms of Use. Such information may be used or requested to perform research, improve usability of the site, administer mailing lists or online communities, or other activi es related to the services provided by the Site. This information may include, but is not limited to, person’s names, email addresses, location. The above mentioned data is collected by the Site only with the intention to conduct the business and for the facilitation of the correct and mely delivery of the products and improvement of the services. The collected data is preserved with the Site safely and is not sold/disclosed to a third party, whatsoever, beyond the terms of the privacy policy.

Disclosure of Information

Available log records and all data stored on our servers may be accessed by our system administrators. In the event that we are required by law (including a court order) to disclose the information you submit. We prefer to independently object to overly broad requests for access to information about users of our site, but we cannot assure you that we will be able to do this in all cases. If you do not challenge the disclosure request yourself, we may be legally required to turn over your information. The data so collected by the Site may be disclosed to other companies in our group including our agents and subcontractors who help us to deliver the goods to you, collect payments from you, analyse the data and provide us with the marketing or customer service assistance. The data may also be shared for the purpose of the fraud protection, credit risk reduction, for conducting cases. In the event the business or a part of it is sold to any other entity or the business under goes a merger/amalgamation/ demerger, the relevant data may be transferred to such other new entity. Besides the above, We reserve the right to transfer any personal information we have about you in the event that we sell or transfer all or a por on of our business or assets, and in case of any such transfers, a specific notice will be issued to the customers in maintaining them about the transfer of their data as part of the business transfer. We partner with outside companies to provide you with additional services related to Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited, such as ride-sharing or parking benefits. When you purchase, register, or otherwise express interest in a product or service oﬀered by a third party through Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited or sponsored on our site, you consent to our sharing your personal information with those par es. Participation in rewards programs, discount oﬀers, contests, or other programs that involve third par es, authorizes Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited to share your personal information with those par es. A third party’s use of your information is bound by contracts and agreements between Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited and the third party. We only share information reasonably needed to provide additional services, and such shared information may be bound by other privacy agreements. By sharing this information, you agree that Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited is not liable or responsible for the ac ons or inactions of third parties.

Security

The Site’s primary goal in collecting personal information is to provide you, the member, with a potentially fulfilling experience. The information collected by the Site is protected by the use of appropriate technical and security measures to prevent unauthorized or unlawful access to or accidental loss of or destruction or damage to your information, as required under Applicable Laws. However, it is brought to your notice that when you use our services or post on the Site, some of the Personal Information you share is visible to other users and can be read, collected, or used by them. You are responsible for such Personal Information you choose to submit in these instances. For example, if you list your name and email address on the site, that information is public. Please take care when using these features. Further, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password and for restricting access to your computer, and you agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account or password. It is however expressly clarified that we will not be responsible for any third party access to information provided by you on the Site by any third party arising as a result of any unauthorized access or use. The Company will be compliant with the reasonable security prac ces and procedures, as required under Applicable Law.

Log Files

Like most standard web site servers we use log files. This includes IP (internet protocol) addresses, browser type, ISP (internet service provider), referring / exit pages, platform type, date / me stamp and number of clicks to analyze trends, administer the site, track user’s movement in the aggregate, and gather broad demographic information for aggregate use. IP addresses, etc. are not linked to personally identifiable information. The same may be used to track the behavior of the customers or identify the area of interest of the customer, which might further be useful for advertisement, promotions etc.

Cookies

As set forth above under “Normal Browsing” anonymous users may receive session cookies while visiting our Site while their browser is open. “Users” are subject to the Site’s Terms of Use. Registered Users receive session cookies when they are signed into our Site. To facilitate our functions, we may use cookies to recognize when you return to our website, if any.

Posting

Posting or updating content is a public ac on undertaken by Member who are subject to the Samvreeddhi Mobility Private Limited Membership – Terms and Conditions as set out on the Site. For the avoidance of doubt, identification of all contributed content may include, but is not limited to, display of your name. Editing or deleting content may alter the displayed state of the content but will not permanently delete the content from the Site.

Other Websites

When you are on the Site and are asked for personal information by the Site, you are sharing that information with the Site only. However, material on the Site may link to independently run websites outside the domain of the Site. The Site is not responsible for the privacy practices or content of such websites. We encourage you to read the privacy policies of any websites you visit from this website as users and other members may be able to access certain information that you provide to them (e.g. your e-mail address and content that you post on the blog). The Site is not in a position to monitor or control any particular user’s or community member’s use of that content.

THE SITE IS NOT ENGAGED IN THE OCCUPATION OF STORING, PROCURING OR USAGE OF THE INFORMATION (USER NAMES, PASSWORDS OR EMAILS) THAT YOU MAY ACCESS BY THE USE OF YOUR SOCIAL NETWORKING ACCOUNT FOR THE PURPOSES OF LIKE, TWEETING, +1 BUTTON, OR MENTION AND SUBSEQUENTLY CAN’T BE HELD LIABLE FOR THE SAME.

letzryd-in-pact-with-mbsi.title: LetzRyd in pact with MBSI
letzryd-in-pact-with-mbsi.html:
Let’s Connect
Let’s Connect

LetzRyd in pact with MBSI

NEWS AND MEDIA

The Hans India

12/12/20241 min read

LetzRyd, a fleet management company, and Moto Business Service India Pvt Ltd (MBSI), a vehicle management provider, have announced a strategic partnership to deploy 51 Maruti Wagon R CNG vehicles in Bengaluru. The first batch of vehicles was handed over at a ceremony held at the LetzRyd Bengaluru Office. Tarun Jain, CEO, LetzRyd, said: “Today marks the beginning of an exciting chapter in our journey. Beyond addressing the urban commute needs of over 20,000 customers, we are also proud to be MBSI’s significant partner.”

The Hindu Bureau

12/25/20241 min read

LetzRyd, a City-based fleet management company and Moto Business Service India (MBSI), a vehicle management provider owned by Yamaha Motor Co., have announced a strategic partnership to deploy 51 Maruti Wagon R CNG vehicles in the City.

Jain, CEO & Co-Founder of LetzRyd, said, that in the next two years, the platform would scale its fleet to over 2,000 vehicles across four more cities, other than Bengaluru.

According to Mr. Jain, this collaboration will accelerate the adoption of shared mobility in the City and across the country. ‘‘LetzRyd will ensure a seamless ride-sharing experience for its customers, while MBSI, with its extensive expertise in vehicle leasing, will play a key role in promoting the shared mobility ecosystem,’‘ he added.

Nakao Hiroshi, CEO and Managing Director of MBSI, said, ‘‘Our shared vision is to create meaningful employment opportunities while expanding the availability of shared vehicles across cities in India. By fostering a dynamic and sustainable mobility ecosystem, we aim to address key transportation challenges and accelerate the widespread adoption of eco-friendly solutions.’‘

letzryd-and-mbsi-announce-partnership-fo.html:
Let’s Connect
Let’s Connect

LetzRyd and MBSI Announce Partnership for Deployment of 51 Maruti Vehicles to Enhance Urban Mobility in Bengaluru

NEWS AND MEDIA

Bangalore News Network

12/18/20243 min read

LetzRyd, is a fleet management company which provides ride hailing companies with high quality cars & drivers, and drivers/fleet operators with access to vehicle ownership and Moto Business Service India Pvt. Ltd. (MBSI), a prominent vehicle management and service provider in the shared mobility sector, today announced a major partnership for the deployment of Maruti Wagon R (CNG) vehicles in Bengaluru. The first batch of 51 vehicles were officially handed over during a ceremony at the LetzRyd Bengaluru Office, marking a significant step towards enhancing urban mobility in India.

This collaboration will accelerate the adoption of shared mobility in India, with LetzRyd ensuring a seamless ride-sharing experience for its customers, while MBSI, with its extensive expertise in vehicle leasing, will play a key role in promoting the shared mobility ecosystem. The deployment of CNG vehicles reflects a shared commitment in providing sustainable transportation solutions to urban commuters.

Speaking at the event, Tarun Jain, CEO & Co-Founder of LetzRyd, said, "Today marks the beginning of an exciting chapter in our journey with MBSI. Beyond addressing the urban commute needs of over 20,000 customers, we are also proud to be MBSI’s significant partner in Bengaluru city. In the next two years, we plan to scale our fleet to over 2,000 vehicles across four more cities. Since our launch in March 2024, we’ve facilitated more than 2 lakh trips, and we are aiming to hit that number monthly in the coming months. We thank Nakao-san and the MBSI team for their trust and support, and we also extend our gratitude to our investment partner, UNLEASH Capital, for their continued belief in our vision.

LetzRyd vision is to revolutionize transportation by empowering drivers with the tools and opportunities to achieve financial independence and long-term security. The platform’s integrated vehicle and driver management system maximizes asset productivity, helping drivers earn more and elevating the overall efficiency of the fleet. We aim to lead in fleet management solutions, delivering reliable, efficient, and sustainable services to our partners.

Nakao Hiroshi, CEO and Managing Director of MBSI, said, We are excited to partner with LetzRyd on this groundbreaking initiative. Our shared vision is to create meaningful employment opportunities while expanding the availability of shared vehicles across cities in India. By fostering a dynamic and sustainable mobility ecosystem, we aim to address key transportation challenges and accelerate the widespread adoption of eco-friendly solutions. Together, we are not just solving urban commute issues; we are paving the way for a greener, more sustainable future for transportation in India”

In addition to this partnership, LetzRyd had secured $1 million in funding last month from UNLEASH Capital Partners, marking the firm’s third investment in India. This fund will help LetzRyd expand its fleet to over 1,000 vehicles and scale operations to four additional cities, incorporating a mix of electric and internal combustion engine (ICE) vehicles. Founded in 2023 and headquartered in Bengaluru, LetzRyd currently operates in Bengaluru and Hyderabad with over 200 vehicles.

Tarun Jain, Co-Founder of LetzRyd, shared, "We are planning to launch our operations in Mumbai this month with an initial fleet of 100 cars, our strategic vision is to expand rapidly across four key cities—Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Mumbai, and Chennai. Over the next 6 to 9 months, we aim to grow our presence in each city, scaling to 300 cars per location, while ensuring operational excellence and a seamless experience for our customers. This ambitious plan reflects our commitment to growth, innovation, and providing accessible, reliable transportation solutions in India’s most dynamic urban markets."

Natsuki Sugai, Founder and Managing Partner at UNLEASH Capital Partners, commented, "We view LetzRyd as a high-impact business that is transforming the mobility landscape in India. Our research shows that drivers affiliated with LetzRyd can increase their earning potential by 30-60% compared to driving their own cars. We are confident in the company’s ability to capture a significant portion of the ride-hailing market."

The Indian ride-hailing market, valued at approximately $9 billion, is projected to grow at a CAGR of 15%. With an annual demand of 250,000 vehicles on platforms like Ola and Uber, LetzRyd’s innovative model, strong industry connections, and expansion plans placing it in a prime position to capture a significant share of this rapidly growing market. LetzRyd currently generates approximately USD 2.0 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) and is poised to triple its growth in the next year.
